books.title: The Documents in the Case
books.author: Dorothy L. Sayers
books.summary: A man’s apparently accidental death soon arouses suspicions.

books.title: The Law of the Four Just Men
books.author: Edgar Wallace
books.summary: A group of wealthy vigilantes continue their quest to bring justice to those criminals beyond the reach of conventional law.

books.title: A Daughter of the Samurai
books.author: Etsu Inagaki Sugimoto
books.summary: The autobiography of Etsu Sugimoto, a girl born into a samurai family in a time of great cultural changes.

books.title: The Lives and Opinions of Eminent Philosophers
books.author: Diogenes Laërtius
books.summary: Brief biographies of the prominent philosophers of ancient Greece.

books.title: Old Indian Legends
books.author: Zitkála-Šá
books.summary: A collection of Dakota legends retold by Zitkála-Šá.

books.title: A Midsummer Night’s Dream
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: This comedy follows four lovers and a thespian who become bewitched by fairies.

books.title: Six Characters in Search of an Author
books.author: Luigi Pirandello
books.summary: An absurdist comedy that contrasts illusion with reality, in which six characters arrive on a rehearsal stage filled with actors and demand the chance to speak their lines and act out the story of their lives.

books.title: Fifty-One Tales
books.author: Lord Dunsany
books.summary: A series of otherworldly short stories ranging from the moral to the whimsical.

books.title: Red Harvest
books.author: Dashiell Hammett
books.summary: A hard-boiled detective arrives at a small mining town only to find his client murdered and the inhabitants embroiled in complex webs of corruption.

books.title: Dracula
books.author: Bram Stoker
books.summary: An ancient undead monster terrorizes Victorian London.

books.title: The Bolshevik Myth
books.author: Alexander Berkman
books.summary: A left-wing radical records his experiences in revolutionary Russia.

books.title: Ashton-Kirk, Investigator
books.author: John T. McIntyre
books.summary: A young investigator becomes intrigued by the murder of a dislikeable numismatist.

books.title: A Yankee in the Trenches
books.author: Robert Derby Holmes
books.summary: An American describes his experiences in the British Army in the First World War.

books.title: Beyond Good and Evil
books.author: Friedrich Nietzsche
books.summary: Nietzsche’s philosophical treatise on the ambiguity of traditional morality.

books.title: John Brown’s Body
books.author: Stephen Vincent Benét
books.summary: The sweeping tragedy of the American Civil War is chronicled through the interwoven experiences of soldiers and civilians from both the North and the South.

books.title: The Mercy of Allah
books.author: Hilaire Belloc
books.summary: An entrepreneurial businessman satirically relates to his nephews how he became the wealthiest man in Baghdad.

books.title: The Jewels of Aptor
books.author: Samuel R. Delany
books.summary: Four companions travel to the mysterious island of Aptor in search of a jewel.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Jonas Lie
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Norwegian author Jonas Lie, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: A collection of George MacDonald’s fairy tales, short stories, and novellas.

books.title: The Mirror of the Sea
books.author: Joseph Conrad
books.summary: An autobiographical memoir on Joseph Conrad’s maritime experiences and his relationship with the sea.
